name: ayurdiet-ai
description: AyurDiet AI — Ayurvedic diet planning platform

scripts.dev: concurrently --names frontend,backend,ai --prefix-colors cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.dev:ai: uv run --project ai_services python -m uvicorn ai_services.main:app --port 5001 --reload
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
